mutation.scope: run-critical pure modules: policy-core, kanban policy, power-core, improver policy rule (engine.mjs excluded: I/O-heavy, timeout-noise; its behavior is covered by run-engine/kanban integration tests)
mutation.response: 26 killer assertions committed (e9cc256) pinning autonomy rules, D9 evidence branches, rail fallbacks, power-signal boundaries; improver tests switched to static imports (coverage was invisible to the runner)
mutation.notes: policy-core noCoverage residue = v1-migration + markdown-rendering paths exercised by suite files outside the focused mutation config; survivors dominated by defensive optional-chaining equivalents

securityReview.by: run-owner independent adversarial pass (deep reviewers stalled) + gitleaks + semgrep-available
findings_fixed: monitor vitals hang -> feed freeze (hardening) -> f5266b2
reviewed_clean: snapshots shell+API (no request input to shell; printed restore)
securityReview.gitleaks: 5 hits total: 4 pre-existing baseline (docs/phases May/Jul + dev-env bundle, out of run scope), 1 this-run fabricated sandbox pairing token (12-char demo, not the 48-hex real format) redacted from the tip
securityReview.semgrep: available; not auto-run (no project ruleset configured; manual adversarial pass substituted)

codexCheckpoint.detail: OpenAI auth 401 (Missing bearer): no API key in env, ~/.codex, or Vault. Preflight ping failed; the run-level cross-model checkpoint cannot execute. Per autothing-codex-checkpoint: a genuine auth failure is an EXTERNAL blocker recorded degraded, never a silent skip or false clean. The codex-runtime serialization path it would use was independently reviewed + hardened this run (35ce2ee).

report.detail: AUTOTHING_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL unset; report composed to report-summary.md and printed in place (a missing webhook never fails the run)

globalGate.summary: 16/16 slices passed; full suite 1637 green; 8/8 UI walkthroughs + 10 casts; 5 independent-review defects fixed (2 blockers); mutation+security-review PASS; deliberate-red PASS; codex-checkpoint + report DEGRADED (external/config); acceptance verified to env limits with named external blockers (codex 401, GCS scope, D37 compute, Mac hardware)

designAudit.by: fresh-context design auditors (da-s34, da-s712, da-s1011) - verdicts recovered from subagent transcripts (mailbox lag)
